## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue/feature being addressed.

- Fixes #(issue)
- Feature description:

---

## 🛠️ Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactoring / Cleanup
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update

---

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Tested locally on Paper server (Version: `1.20.x`)
- [ ] Verified in-game mechanics and commands
- [ ] Checked console logs for errors/warnings

---

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors in the console.
- [ ] I have tested my changes in a live/test server environment.
